headline: Commure Raises $70M at $7B Valuation to Transform Healthcare Operations Using AI
summary: MOUNTAIN VIEW, Calif., May 19, 2026 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- Commure, the AI platform for healthcare, today announced $70 million in financing at a $7 billion post-money valuation. The round was led by General Catalyst, with participation from Sequoia Capital, Morgan Stanley, and Kirkland & Ellis. Commure deploys advanced AI and Agents across health systems and practices transforming the day-to-day lives of providers and healthcare administrators. headline: HCA Healthcare Colleagues Volunteer More Than 41,800 Hours During Annual Days of Service Initiative
summary: NASHVILLE, Tenn., May 19, 2026--HCA Healthcare, Inc. (NYSE:HCA), one of the nation’s leading healthcare providers, today announced the results of its seventh annual We Show Up for Our Communities days of service volunteer initiative. In alignment with National Volunteer Month, HCA Healthcare colleagues across the country donated their time and expertise to help improve the health and well-being of the communities the company serves.
